creator: dannyman@arh0300.urh.uiuc.edu
text:
# pw adduser tunji -u 1008 -g 1008 -s /usr/local/bin/tcsh -w random
pwd_mkdb: illegal option -- c
usage: pwd_mkdb [-c] [-p] [-d <dest dir>] [-u <local username>] file
pw: password update: Input/output error

How-To-Repeat: 
Upon creating an /etc/pw.conf with similar options, same result with;
pw adduser tunji -u 1008 -g 1008
